page_content:
Prerequisite: SPAN303 and SPAN311; or SPAN316; or permission of instructor.

SPAN386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits)

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.

Restriction: Junior standing or higher.

SPAN388W Writing Center Internship (1-6 Credits)

Examines face-to-face and online writing center theory and practice through readings, exercises, and supervised tutoring. Students investigate the writing process and help other writers to negotiate it. Prerequisite: Permission of the Writing Center (1205 Tawes Hall). Cross-listed with: ENGL388W.
